mapper.select: SELECT lv.level_seq AS levelId, lv.level_name AS levelName, ch.chapter_id AS chapterId, ch.chapter_name AS chapterName, ch.reward_cash AS testReward, ch.test_pay AS testPay, ls.lesson_id AS lessonId, ls.lesson_name AS lessonName, ls.description AS lessonDesc, ls.lesson_type AS lessonType FROM learning_level AS lv JOIN learning_chapter AS ch ON lv.level_seq = ch.level_seq JOIN learning_lesson AS ls ON ch.chapter_id = ls.chapter_id ORDER BY 1, 3, 7
select level_seq AS levelId, level_name AS levelName from learning_level

select lv.level_seq AS levelSeq, ch.chapter_id AS chapterId, ch.chapter_name AS chapterName, ch.reward_cash AS testReward, ch.test_pay AS testPay from learning_level as lv left join learning_chapter as ch on lv.level_seq = ch.level_seq where lv.level_seq = #{level_seq}

select result_seq as resultId, lv.level_seq AS levelId, lv.level_name AS levelName, ch.chapter_id AS chapterId, ch.chapter_name AS chapterName, us.lesson_id as lessonId, us.started_at as startDate, us.finished_at as endDate from user_question_result AS us JOIN learning_lesson AS ls ON us.lesson_id = ls.lesson_id JOIN learning_chapter AS ch ON ch.chapter_id = ls.chapter_id JOIN learning_level as lv ON lv.level_seq = ch.level_seq where user_seq = #{user_seq} order by levelId desc, chapterId desc, lessonId desc
mapper.insert: insert into user_mission (user_seq, mission_seq, is_completed, is_rewarded, started_at, progress) select #{user_seq}, mission_seq, 'N', 'N', Now(), 0 from mission where mission_seq in (1,2,3,4);
mapper.select: select ms.mission_seq as missionId, mission_type AS type, mission_title AS content, mission_reward AS reward, ms.target_value AS count, um.progress, um.is_rewarded AS isRewarded, um.is_completed AS isSuccess from mission ms join user_mission um on ms.mission_seq = um.mission_seq where um.user_seq = #{user_seq}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_question_result WHERE user_seq = #{user_seq} and DATE_FORMAT(finished_at, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()) AS lesson,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_test_result WHERE user_seq = #{user_seq} and DATE_FORMAT(tested_at, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()) AS chapterTest,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mock_trade WHERE user_seq = #{user_seq} and DATE_FORMAT(traded_at, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()) AS buyStocks,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_watchlist WHERE user_seq = #{user_seq} and DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()) AS watchList FROM DUAL
mapper.update: update user_account join user_mission on user_account.user_seq = user_mission.user_seq join mission on user_mission.mission_seq = mission.mission_seq set cash_balance = cash_balance + mission_reward, user_mission.is_completed = 'Y', user_mission.is_rewarded = 'Y' where user_account.user_seq = #{user_seq} and mission.mission_seq = #{mission_seq}
mapper.select: select test_result_seq as resultSeq, user_seq as userSeq, chapter_id as chapterId, score, is_pass as isPass, tested_at as testDate from user_test_result where user_seq = #{user_seq}
